src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern frameworks.
Replace deprecated ObjectMapper constructor with JsonMapper builder pattern to align with current Jackson best practices.
Enable PROPAGATE_TRANSIENT_MARKER to ensure transient fields are handled consistently during serialization/deserialization.
Remove obsolete manual parent restoration logic now that Jackson annotations handle bidirectional references automatically.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.general_idea: Comment out unused utility method restoreParents to clean up the codebase.
Remove commented-out debug/test code for adding sub-nodes.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the javax.persistence package to the jakarta.persistence package to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required for modern Java versions.
Replace javax.persistence import with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes required for modern application servers and frameworks.
Migrate JPA annotations from the javax.persistence package to the jakarta.persistence package to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern frameworks.
Add JsonManagedReference annotation to handle bidirectional relationships in JSON serialization.
Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements for Java 21.
Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required for modern frameworks.
Replace generic @JsonIgnore with @JsonBackReference to explicitly handle bidirectional parent-child serialization cycles.
Moved @JsonIgnore annotation from changeListeners to certificateHandling to ensure correct JSON serialization behavior.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.human_impl: Removed @JsonIgnore from changeListeners and added it to certificateHandling.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Updated @SuppressWarnings annotation to use 'removal' instead of 'deprecation' for the finalize method, aligning with Java 9+ semantics where finalize is marked for removal.
Migrate validation annotations from the javax.validation package to the jakarta.validation package to align with Jakarta EE standards.
Replace javax.validation import with jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
Disable specific Lombok @ToString options to resolve compilation errors with the newer Lombok version.
